title: LinkedIn Connections Persistent Scraper Input Schema

roles.title: Outreach Roles / Titles
roles.description: Recruiter/HR roles to search for (e.g. 'Recruiter', 'HR Professional', 'Talent Acquisition').

regions.title: Target Regions / Locations
regions.description: Target locations or regions to filter by (e.g. 'Greater Toronto Area', 'Greater New York City Area').

contextKeywords.title: IT / Job Context Keywords
contextKeywords.description: Specific industry or role contexts to filter profiles (e.g. 'IT Helpdesk', 'IT Support', 'IT').

limitPerQuery.title: Limit Per Search Query
limitPerQuery.description: Maximum profile results to scrape per query/region pair.

usePersistenceFilter.title: Filter Out Previously Scraped Profiles
usePersistenceFilter.description: If enabled, the actor will not scrape profiles that were already scraped in previous runs of this actor.

persistenceStoreName.title: Named Key-Value Store for Persistence
persistenceStoreName.description: The name of the Key-Value store to save and load scraped profile URLs for deduplication across runs.
